items.title: 最热板块业绩来袭！英特尔领衔芯片股财报，市场动荡能否缓和？
items.title_zh: 最热板块业绩来袭！英特尔领衔芯片股财报，市场动荡能否缓和？
items.summary: 未调用大模型，以下为原文关键信息摘录：{{aisd}} AI生成 免责声明 芯片制造商正成为华尔街焦点：本月板块股价走势阴晴不定，投资者押注数十家估值大幅抬升的芯片企业，将贡献标普500指数二季度重要盈利增量。不过，交易过度集中叠加杠杆型ETF规模激增令市场波动性居高不下，对投资者风险偏好造成打压。；业绩预期高涨 费城半导体指数年内涨幅惊人，但近期这支由30只成分股构成的指数彻底沦为高波动行情的舞台。7月以来累计回撤18%，本月12个交易日里，有半数交易日单日波动幅度超3个百分点。上周五收盘时，半导体指数较6月末创下的历史收盘高点跌幅刚好突破20%，进入技术性熊市。；伦敦证券交易所集团LSEG数据显示：标普500成分股中的半导体及半导体设备企业，二季度净利润同比预期大增133%，预计贡献全指数约44%的整体盈利增幅。截至上周五，标普500全部成分股二季度盈利同比预估增长26%。
important_points: {{aisd}} AI生成 免责声明 芯片制造商正成为华尔街焦点：本月板块股价走势阴晴不定，投资者押注数十家估值大幅抬升的芯片企业，将贡献标普500指数二季度重要盈利增量。不过，交易过度集中叠加杠杆型ETF规模激增令市场波动性居高不下，对投资者风险偏好造成打压。
业绩预期高涨 费城半导体指数年内涨幅惊人，但近期这支由30只成分股构成的指数彻底沦为高波动行情的舞台。7月以来累计回撤18%，本月12个交易日里，有半数交易日单日波动幅度超3个百分点。上周五收盘时，半导体指数较6月末创下的历史收盘高点跌幅刚好突破20%，进入技术性熊市。
伦敦证券交易所集团LSEG数据显示：标普500成分股中的半导体及半导体设备企业，二季度净利润同比预期大增133%，预计贡献全指数约44%的整体盈利增幅。截至上周五，标普500全部成分股二季度盈利同比预估增长26%。

items.summary: 未调用大模型，以下为原文关键信息摘录：{{aisd}} AI生成 免责声明 30年期主力合约涨0.12%报113.860元，10年期主力合约涨0.02%报109.150元，5年期主力合约涨0.03%报106.425元，2年期主力合约涨0.01%报102.624元。；日本国立社会保障与人口问题研究所此前预测显示，日本出生人数降至67万人左右可能发生在2040年，但现实却是，这一情况已提前15年到来。；“随着不确定因素逐步消退，市场有望获得进一步上涨的动力。” 线上保险纠纷增速明显。
important_points: {{aisd}} AI生成 免责声明 30年期主力合约涨0.12%报113.860元，10年期主力合约涨0.02%报109.150元，5年期主力合约涨0.03%报106.425元，2年期主力合约涨0.01%报102.624元。
日本国立社会保障与人口问题研究所此前预测显示，日本出生人数降至67万人左右可能发生在2040年，但现实却是，这一情况已提前15年到来。

items.title: Nexa Resources: What Q2 Needs To Show To Justify The Rally (NYSE:NEXA)
items.title_zh: Nexa Resources: What Q2 Needs To Show To Justify The Rally (NYSE:NEXA)
items.summary: 未调用大模型，以下为原文关键信息摘录：Nexa Resources (NEXA) is still somewhat regarded as a zinc producer; however, in my opinion, the company has changed its profile.；I believe that the company's results are more and more being formed not only by zinc price but also by silver, copper, lead, and gold Summary - Nexa Resources is evolving from a pure zinc producer to a diversified metals miner, with by-product metals now driving EBITDA.；Recent EBITDA gains are heavily reliant on elevated by-product metal prices, raising concerns about sustainability if commodity prices normalize.
important_points: Nexa Resources (NEXA) is still somewhat regarded as a zinc producer; however, in my opinion, the company has changed its profile.

I believe that the company's results are more and more being formed not only by zinc price but also by silver, copper, lead, and gold Summary - Nexa Resources is evolving from a pure zinc producer to a diversified metals miner, with by-product metals now driving EBITDA.
Recent EBITDA gains are heavily reliant on elevated by-product metal prices, raising concerns about sustainability if commodity prices normalize.

important_points: Summary - McDonald's stock is taking a beating this year, down 10.85% over the last 12 months versus a rising market.
MCD's latest earnings beat expectations: revenue was up 11%, operating incomeÂ was up 12%, and same-store sales were up 3.8%.
While traveling abroad, I noticed that McDonald's is significantly more automated in Asia than in North America.

items.title: Lansing Street Advisors Q2 2026 Letter
items.title_zh: Lansing Street Advisors Q2 2026 Letter
items.summary: 未调用大模型，以下为原文关键信息摘录：Dust in the Wind - Song by Kansas (1977) "I close my eyes,only for a moment, and the moment's goneAll my dreamspass before my eyes with curiosityDust in the windAll they are is dust in the wind" Introduction "All we are is dust in the wind." Kansas wasn't thinking about financial markets in 1977, but the line fits 2026 about as well as anything on a Bloomberg terminal.；This year we watched fortunes that felt permanent blow away in a matter of days: MicroStrategy (MSTR), a small-cap crypto sub-sector, and twenty years of Chinese real estate gains.；The theme of the song, and of this letter, is humility: almost nothing in markets lasts as long as the people riding it believe it will.
important_points: Dust in the Wind - Song by Kansas (1977) "I close my eyes,only for a moment, and the moment's goneAll my dreamspass before my eyes with curiosityDust in the windAll they are is dust in the wind" Introduction "All we are is dust in the wind." Kansas wasn't thinking about financial markets in 1977, but the line fits 2026 about as well as anything on a Bloomberg terminal.
This year we watched fortunes that felt permanent blow away in a matter of days: MicroStrategy (MSTR), a small-cap crypto sub-sector, and twenty years of Chinese real estate gains.
The theme of the song, and of this letter, is humility: almost nothing in markets lasts as long as the people riding it believe it will.

items.title: Capital One bet big on Discover. Now it must prove the gamble was worth it
items.title_zh: Capital One bet big on Discover. Now it must prove the gamble was worth it
items.summary: 未调用大模型，以下为原文关键信息摘录：Capital One poured more than $35 billion into acquiring credit card rival Discover.；After a couple of lackluster quarters and a slumping stock price, CEO Richard Fairbank must now prove to investors that the deal is the game-changer that was promised.；The perfect stage to do that is Tuesday evening when Club name Capital One reports second-quarter results.
important_points: Capital One poured more than $35 billion into acquiring credit card rival Discover.
After a couple of lackluster quarters and a slumping stock price, CEO Richard Fairbank must now prove to investors that the deal is the game-changer that was promised.
The perfect stage to do that is Tuesday evening when Club name Capital One reports second-quarter results.

items.title: The bar for Tesla earnings is sky-high. Here's why and how options traders can capitalize
items.title_zh: The bar for Tesla earnings is sky-high. Here's why and how options traders can capitalize
items.summary: 未调用大模型，以下为原文关键信息摘录：As Tesla (TSLA) prepares to report second-quarter earnings on Wednesday, the backdrop for the EV giant looks increasingly challenging.；Despite a seemingly strong macro footprint, a mix of fundamental headwinds, competitive pressure and lofty valuation expectations suggests that risks are skewed to the downside heading into the release.；Tesla recently released second-quarter sales and delivery figures that easily beat consensus expectations.
important_points: As Tesla (TSLA) prepares to report second-quarter earnings on Wednesday, the backdrop for the EV giant looks increasingly challenging.

Despite a seemingly strong macro footprint, a mix of fundamental headwinds, competitive pressure and lofty valuation expectations suggests that risks are skewed to the downside heading into the release.
Tesla recently released second-quarter sales and delivery figures that easily beat consensus expectations.

items.title: Coinbase trading results may fall short of expectations, according to prediction markets
items.title_zh: Coinbase trading results may fall short of expectations, according to prediction markets
items.summary: 未调用大模型，以下为原文关键信息摘录：As bitcoin prices fell yet again in the second quarter, traders on prediction market platform Kalshi think Coinbase's trading volumes suffered once again.；The cryptocurrency trading platform is expected to post a third consecutive quarterly decline of trading volumes, and speculators are also feeling confident that total trading volume will slip below $200 billion for the first time since third quarter 2024.；Traders give a 41% chance that trading volume is above $160 billion, and just a 25% chance it's above $170 billion.
important_points: As bitcoin prices fell yet again in the second quarter, traders on prediction market platform Kalshi think Coinbase's trading volumes suffered once again.

The cryptocurrency trading platform is expected to post a third consecutive quarterly decline of trading volumes, and speculators are also feeling confident that total trading volume will slip below $200 billion for the first time since third quarter 2024.
Traders give a 41% chance that trading volume is above $160 billion, and just a 25% chance it's above $170 billion.

items.title: UK's Andy Burnham becomes PM as Trump slams Britain as 'Poverty Stricken Disaster'
items.title_zh: UK's Andy Burnham becomes PM as Trump slams Britain as 'Poverty Stricken Disaster'
items.summary: 未调用大模型，以下为原文关键信息摘录：Andy Burnham became the U.K.'s seventh prime minister in a decade on Monday, with investors and market watchers already questioning his policy agenda.；King Charles III formally asked Burnham to form a government at Buckingham Palace earlier on Monday, which Burnham confirmed he has accepted.；"We will make this moment a circuit breaker for Britain, bringing forward a new political model and a new economic model," Burnham said in his first speech as premier on Monday.
important_points: Andy Burnham became the U.K.'s seventh prime minister in a decade on Monday, with investors and market watchers already questioning his policy agenda.
King Charles III formally asked Burnham to form a government at Buckingham Palace earlier on Monday, which Burnham confirmed he has accepted.
"We will make this moment a circuit breaker for Britain, bringing forward a new political model and a new economic model," Burnham said in his first speech as premier on Monday.
